commands.review_summary:
The PR applies plugin auto-enable during CLI plugin registry loading and adds a channel-summary plugin list debug print.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the current `status --json` fast path disables channel data and passes `includeChannelSummary: false`, while the summary resolver still excludes setup-fallback plugins when reached.
commands.review_followup: This external PR needs contributor real behavior proof, branch rework, and maintainer direction on the `status --json` channel-summary contract before implementation should proceed.

target.title: fix: apply plugin auto-enable during CLI plugin registry load
target.body:
Fixes #79797

When running CLI commands that require the plugin registry (like `status --json`), `ensurePluginRegistryLoaded()` previously loaded plugins using the raw config, skipping the auto-enable logic for configured channels (like Telegram/WhatsApp/Discord). This caused `channelSummary` to silently omit those configured-but-implicitly-enabled channels.

This PR wraps `loadConfig()` with `applyPluginAutoEnable()` in the registry loader, matching the Gateway startup path and ensuring CLI tools see the same effective plugins.
target.author: sjhddh

commands.reason: repair commands require an open issue or PR
